zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela Stanhowe於大約1274年出生時，她的父親John Stanhowe27歲，母親Ela Bellemont23歲。她於大約1294年與WALTER DE CALTHORPE在英國諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ela Stanhowe于大约1274年出生时，她的父亲John Stanhowe27岁，母亲Ela Bellemont23岁。她于大约1294年与WALTER DE CALTHORPE在英国諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Stanhowe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stanhope (Durham), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + hop ‘valley’.

History: A family of this name have held the title Earl of Harrington since 1742, and were Earls of Chesterfield from 1628–1967. Philip Stanhope, 1st Earl of Chesterfield, was a Royalist soldier in the English Civil War. He was captured in 1643 and died in prison in 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently an altered form of Hilda , not in use before the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela Stanhowe was born about 1274, her father, John Stanhowe, was 27 and her mother, Ela Bellemont, was 23. She married WALTER DE CALTHORPE about 1294, in Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela Stanhoweが約1274年に生まれた時，父John Stanhoweは27歳，母Ela Bellemontは23歳であった。約1294年にイギリスノーフォルクウエルズ ネクスト ス セアでWALTER DE CALTHORPEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: Ela Stanhowe(이)가 대략 1274년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stanhowe(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela Bellemont(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1294년 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시에서 WALTER DE CALTHORPE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela Stanhowe родилась около 1274 г., её отцу по имени John Stanhowe было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela Bellemont, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени WALTER DE CALTHORPE около 1294 г. в местности веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери.
